API Pricing

Transparent pay-as-you-go pricing for Atlas Cloud AI models

Pricing Model

Atlas Cloud uses transparent pay-as-you-go pricing. No minimum commitments, no hidden fees.

New User Bonus

All new users get an extra 20% bonus on their first top-up. Sign up via a referral link to get 25% bonus instead (up to $100). Sign up now

Billing Rules

Model TypeBilling UnitHow It Works
LLM (Chat)Per million tokensBased on input + output token count
Image GenerationPer generationVaries by model, resolution, and parameters
Video GenerationPer generationVaries by model, duration, and resolution
Image ToolsPer operationBackground removal, upscaling, face swap, etc.
  • LLM token usage is counted and deducted hourly
  • Image/Video generation is charged per request

Model Prices

View real-time pricing for all 300+ models:

Atlas Cloud Pricing Page

You can also view pricing on each model's detail page in the Model Library.

Volume Discounts

We offer competitive rates for high-volume customers.

Estimate your usage

Calculate your expected monthly API consumption across all models.

Contact sales

Email sales@atlascloud.ai with your estimated volume.

Get custom pricing

Receive a tailored pricing plan based on your usage patterns.

Developer Plans

Temporarily Unavailable

Developer subscription plans are currently offline. Stay tuned for official announcements on when they will return. For high-volume needs, contact sales@atlascloud.ai for a custom plan.

Cost Optimization Tips

  • Choose the right model: More expensive doesn't always mean better for your use case. Test multiple models to find the best quality-to-cost ratio
  • Use smaller models for simple tasks: For basic Q&A or classification, a smaller, cheaper LLM may be sufficient
  • Set max_tokens: Limit response length for LLM calls to avoid unnecessary token usage
  • Batch efficiently: Group similar requests together and process them efficiently
  • Monitor usage: Track your spending in the Console to identify optimization opportunities

Payment

  • Top up at Billing via credit card, WeChat Pay, Alipay, or cryptocurrency
  • Minimum top-up: $10
  • Auto top-up available to prevent service interruptions
  • Credits expire 365 days from purchase

For full billing details including GPU Cloud pricing, see the Billing page.
